question: Can I get an extension after the deadline has passed?
final_answer:
You can request an extension after the deadline has passed. According to the policy, extensions are typically granted for 48-72 hours beyond the original deadline. You should email your instructor at least 24 hours before the deadline and attach documentation if available, stating the proposed new deadline.
Sources: policy_extensions.md
